prestazioni: K20A Type R (2.0L DOHC i-VTEC) engine with a custom-built 88mm forged crankshaft from Tomei, paired with Manley I-beam connecting rods and JE 87.5mm forged pistons for a 2.2L stroker build, achieving 12.5:1 compression ratio for high-octane (100+ RON) forced induction applications

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, mated to a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Hypertune, supporting 450+ hp on E85 with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.785 final drive), reinforced half-shafts from Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3), and a K-Tuned billet aluminum transmission mount with Energy Suspension polyurethane inserts to handle 500+ lb-ft torque
estetica: Voltex Type-7 rear wing with carbon fiber construction and adjustable angle mounts (30-45 degrees), paired with a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter by Rocket Bunny (FD2-specific) for balanced aero at 180+ kph
Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front and 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels with 245/35/18 and 275/30/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, wrapped in custom matte gunmetal paint with gold Work wheel hardware

Full J's Racing Type-GT widebody conversion kit (FD2-specific), including carbon fiber fenders, side skirts, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser, finished in Honda Championship White (NH-0) with a custom purple-to-blue vinyl wrap gradient on the hood and roof
